title: 2026-06-24 Istanbul Sumac Bosphorus Gaze Mix
summary: Istanbul summer set using sumac red across SALT Galata archive work, Bomontiada music-courtyard motion, Istanbul Modern waterfront outerwear, and a Kadikoy ferry task/reflection moment.
summaryJa: イスタンブールのアルバム。色の軸はスマックレッド。構成はミュージアム、音楽の場、移動。

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman at a SALT Galata-style archive table in Istanbul, looking up toward a near-camera coworker while holding paper samples, wearing an ivory sleeveless linen waistcoat, pale blue-gray scoop-neck knit shell, charcoal cropped barrel trousers, sheer smoke socks, oxblood slingback pumps, slim glasses, black tote, and a sumac-red scarf at the waist
images.title: 01 Street SALT Galata archive glance
images.locationDetail: SALT Galata-style archive table in Istanbul

images.alt: Early-20s Japanese-centered woman turning into a Bomontiada-style music courtyard in Istanbul, looking toward an off-frame friend instead of the viewer, wearing a black opaque bandeau-style top under a cropped mesh knit, sumac-red wrap mini skort over black safety shorts, utility belt, hoop earrings, black ribbed slouch socks, perforated ankle boots, and a compact crossbody pouch
images.title: 02 Club Bomontiada comic turn

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman at an Istanbul Modern-style Bosphorus waterfront terrace, seen in profile and back-three-quarter while looking across the water, wearing a charcoal asymmetric sleeveless midi dress, sheer smoke knee-highs, low black heeled sandals, translucent pale-gray organza cropped jacket, sumac-red enamel cuff, and sumac-red clutch
images.title: 03 Outerwear Istanbul Modern organza

images.alt: Adult 18-19 Japanese-centered woman inside a Kadikoy ferry-style cabin in Istanbul, looking down at a ferry card and sandal strap with her face partly visible in the window reflection, wearing a cropped white cotton tee, sage short-sleeve camp shirt tied at the waist, sumac-red pleated mini skort over fitted safety shorts, white rib ankle socks, black fisherman sandals, canvas crossbody bag, shell hair clip, and thin bracelet
images.title: 04 Transit Kadikoy ferry card
